title: bf16 baseline — quality reference for all subsequent compression decisions
source: Reuses Phase 14 measured full-arm numbers (output/eval3/eval3_final_comparison.json) — same vLLM stack, no re-measure needed.

size.serving_constraint: bf16 single-seed pair (114GB) fits nominally but leaves no headroom for KV cache/activations on the 121GB GB10; ensemble (228GB) does not fit. Quantization required to serve with margin.

quality.nine_dim_source: judge rho is the aggregate correlation vs human-relabeled 9-dim scores; per-dim behavior = promoted v1.3 judge

inference_speed.status: unchanged vs base Qwen3-30B-A3B (no params removed; top-8/128 routing, ~3.3B active identical to base)
inference_speed.note: TTFT/throughput not re-benched; architecturally identical to base, no pruning speedup exists to measure

verdict: Gate 1 baseline recorded. This is the +/-2pp reference for the PKG-03 quantization ladder.
